name: Photography Services Agreement
description: A contract between a photographer and a client detailing the scope of a photo shoot, deliverables, payment, and copyright terms.
content:
PHOTOGRAPHY SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Photography Services Agreement (the "Agreement") is made on {{formatDate agreement_date}} by and between the Photographer and the Client named below.

1. THE PARTIES

Photographer: {{photographer_name}}, Address: {{photographer_address}}, Phone: {{photographer_phone}}, Email: {{photographer_email}}

Client: {{client_name}}, Address: {{client_address}}, Phone: {{client_phone}}, Email: {{client_email}}

2. SCOPE OF SERVICES

The Photographer agrees to provide photography services for the following event/shoot:

  • Type of Shoot: {{shoot_type}}
  • Date and Time: {{shoot_datetime}}
  • Location: {{shoot_location}}
  • Estimated Duration: {{shoot_duration}} Hours
  • Estimated Number of Delivered Photos: {{photo_count}}
  • Delivery Format: {{delivery_format}}

3. FEES AND PAYMENT SCHEDULE

The total fee for the photography services is {{total_fee}}.

Payment Schedule:

{{payment_schedule}}
{{#if additional_expenses}}

Additional Expenses (e.g., travel, studio rental): The Client agrees to reimburse the Photographer for the following: {{additional_expenses}}

{{/if}}

4. DELIVERY OF PHOTOS

The Photographer shall deliver the final, edited photographs to the Client within {{delivery_days}} days following the shoot, via {{delivery_method}}.

5. COPYRIGHT AND USAGE RIGHTS

Copyright Ownership: The Photographer retains the original copyright to all images created during the shoot. The Client is granted a non-exclusive, perpetual license to use the images for: {{client_usage_rights}}. The Client may not sell the images to third parties for profit without written consent.

Model Release (Portfolio Use): The Client {{#if (eq portfolio_use_allowed 'Yes')}}GRANTS the Photographer permission to use the resulting images in their professional portfolio, website, and social media for promotional purposes.{{else}}DOES NOT GRANT the Photographer permission to use the images for promotional purposes. The photos will remain private.{{/if}}

6. CANCELLATION AND POSTPONEMENT

In the event the Client cancels or postpones the shoot, the following policy applies: {{cancellation_policy}}

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.

PHOTOGRAPHER
{{photographer_name}}

Signature: _________________________

CLIENT
{{client_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: shoot_type
fields.label: Type of Shoot
fields.placeholder: e.g., Wedding, Corporate Headshots, Family Portrait

fields.name: payment_schedule
fields.label: Payment Schedule
fields.placeholder: e.g., 20% Non-refundable retainer, balance due 2 days before shoot.

fields.name: delivery_method
fields.label: Delivery Method
fields.placeholder: e.g., Google Drive link, USB Drive

fields.name: client_usage_rights
fields.label: Client Usage Rights
fields.placeholder: e.g., Personal printing and social media sharing

fields.name: portfolio_use_allowed
fields.label: Can Photographer use photos for Portfolio?

fields.name: cancellation_policy
fields.label: Cancellation / Postponement Policy
fields.placeholder: e.g., Retainer is forfeited if canceled within 7 days.
